name: Truffes Pralinees (Praline Truffles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slowly melt the chocolate in the water over low heat until smooth.
2. Remove from heat and add egg yolks, beating well with a spatula.
3. Return to low heat and gently poach the eggs in the chocolate mixture, stirring continuously without stopping.
4. Once cooled slightly, add butter and praline paste, continuing to beat until smooth.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely while stirring occasionally.
6. When solidifying, shape small portions into truffle-like forms and coat with grated chocolate prepared beforehand.
7. Store in an airtight container for up to one week. For longer storage, replace butter with vegetable shortening.
